objective: First-wave adult HCC benchmark subset that excludes hepatoblastoma and mixed liver-disease cohorts.
inclusion_principles: Prefer adult hepatocellular carcinoma cohorts with direct tumor versus liver comparator definitions.
Exclude hepatoblastoma, mixed cirrhosis-HCC, or unresolved multiregional cohorts from the first-wave subset.
Separate target-discovery ranking from downstream chemistry validation.

included_datasets.reason: Adult HCC tissue cohort with explicit case/control counts in the accession design.
Paired adult HCC cohort with explicit accession-level counts.
RNA-seq cohort with explicit paired tumor-normal counts.

included_datasets.control_definition: Solid tissue normal samples in TCGA-LIHC
included_datasets.reason: Public GDC project arms are explicit and can be curated separately from the paper's aggregated counts.

excluded_datasets.reason: Adult HCC cohort with resolved 240 versus 193 tumor/adjacent counts, but kept outside the stricter first-wave core to preserve a smaller benchmark slice.
Mixed HDV-HCC, HCV-HCC, HBV-HCC, and cirrhosis cohort rather than a clean adult HCC benchmark.
Comparator arm is adjacent liver from colorectal liver metastasis cases rather than a clean adult-HCC adjacent or healthy liver control.
Treatment-naive multiregional HCC study with unresolved per-arm counts in the retrieved public metadata.

notes: This curated subset is a PrioriTx design choice and is intentionally stricter than the paper's published cohort list.
